1892160.name: RPG Maker MV - Pixelated Animations Pack Vol.1
1892160.description:
Are you looking for some pixelated animations to integrate with your fancy retro styled graphics? Then this pack can solve your problem with a blink of an eye (and a few copy / pastes too)!!

This pack contains a solid base for you journey in building your "pretty cool retro looking game" with 62 awesome animations!!!!!!

Features:

- 62 unique pixelated animations.
- Elemental, Attack, Magic, Buff, Debuff and Nature animations.
- Rendered at 15 FPS to match RPG Maker's FPS (and to give a retro looking aspect).
- Included animated gifs for a fast previewing outside the RPG Maker editor.
- Included a animation data file for an easy copy and paste setting.
- Included some tutorials on how to set up the animations

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
1892160.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 日语, 韩语, 繁体中文, 阿拉伯语, 简体中文
